name: DATA I/O CORP
sic_description: Instruments For Meas & Testing of  Electricity & Elec Signals
summary: Data I/O Corporation is a global provider of advanced programming, security deployment, and IP protection solutions for electronics manufacturing. The company designs, manufactures, and sells automated and manual programming systems (PSV family), security deployment systems (SentriX), and programming engines (LumenX, FlashCORE) targeting flash memory, microcontrollers, secure elements, and authentication devices. Customers include OEMs, EMS contract manufacturers, and programming centers in automotive, IoT, industrial, and consumer electronics markets.
